# Health OS — AI Health Companion
> A persistent, proactive, production-grade AI health platform with long-term memory, health analytics, goal tracking, and a lifelike 3D avatar.

## Core Features
- **Persistent Memory Engine**: Episodic, behavioral, emotional, and health-fact memory with semantic vector search
- **Health Dashboard**: Track weight, glucose, HbA1c, sleep, mood, medication with AI-powered insights
- **AI Goal Tracking**: 8 goal types, 4 coaching personalities, streak tracking, daily evaluations
- **3D Avatar**: Lifelike avatar with 18 facial expressions, lipsync, and 10+ animations
- **Voice Conversations**: ElevenLabs TTS (5 voices), Cartesia TTS, Web Speech API input
- **Multilingual**: English, Hindi, Tamil, Telugu, Bengali
- **Emotional Intelligence**: Detects mood, adapts tone, provides empathetic responses

## Important URLs
- Landing page: https://health-os.vercel.app/
- App dashboard: https://health-os.vercel.app/app
- Avatar studio: https://health-os.vercel.app/demo

## API Endpoints
- POST /api/chat - Send message, get streaming AI response with memory context
- GET/POST /api/session - Session management
- GET/POST/PUT /api/profile - User profile CRUD
- POST /api/voice - TTS voice generation
- GET/POST /api/dashboard - Aggregated health dashboard data
- GET/POST /api/health/metrics - Health metric tracking
- GET/POST/PATCH /api/health/insights - AI-generated health insights
- GET/POST/PATCH/DELETE /api/goals - Goal CRUD with progress
- POST /api/goals/evaluate - Batch evaluate goals
- GET/DELETE /api/memories - Memory retrieval and management

## Architecture
- Next.js 16 App Router + React 19 + TypeScript
- OpenRouter AI (provider-agnostic: GPT-4o-mini, Claude Sonnet, Mistral)
- MongoDB with vector search for memory
- React Three Fiber for 3D avatar
- Zustand for state management

## AI Roles
22 roles: mother, father, doctor, therapist, coach, mentor, friend, partner, caregiver, etc.

## Health Tracking
Metrics: weight, glucose, HbA1c, sleep, mood, exercise, steps, medication, hydration, water
